description:
You are acting as a mobile build-and-release engineer who needs to capture the list of *all* current Android application versions that are shown on a tiny internal dashboard page.  
    1. The dashboard HTML file is already in the workspace at  
       /home/user/webpages/mobile_builds.html  
       and is viewable with any browser.  
    2. Inside that file every version appears in a span element of the exact form  
          <span class="version">v1.2.3</span>  
       (i.e. the literal substring class="version", then the letter “v”, then three dot-separated integers).  
    3. Your job is to write a short headless-scraping routine (it can be shell utilities, Python, Node, or any tool you like that runs without a GUI) that reads the HTML file and produces the following report file:  
          /home/user/reports/latest_build_versions.log  

       Report requirements  
       • One version per line, *only* the text between the span tags (e.g. v1.2.3) with no extra spaces.  
       • Preserve the appearance order from top to bottom of the HTML document.  
       • End the file with a single newline character. No blank lines before or after the list.  

    4. When you are done, display the contents of /home/user/reports/latest_build_versions.log to the terminal so that automated grading can inspect it.

    Hint: Only 3 – 4 shell commands (or one small script plus its launcher) are needed: read the HTML, extract the spans, and redirect to the target file.
truth:
Initial filesystem items provided to the agent: • Directory /home/user/webpages/ (700, owned by user) • File /home/user/webpages/mobile_builds.html (600, owned by user) with the exact content: Internal Mobile Build Dashboard

Latest Android Builds

  • v2.3.1 – 2024-03-01 14:22
  • v2.3.0 – 2024-02-17 09:51
  • v2.2.5 – 2024-02-03 18:07
  • v2.2.4 – 2024-01-19 11:35
The grader will look for the file /home/user/reports/latest_build_versions.log (mode 600 or 644 accepted). Expected exact content (including final newline, no preceding whitespace, no trailing spaces): v2.3.1 v2.3.0 v2.2.5 v2.2.4
